title: Rise of the Tomb Raider
notes: I had a perfect 60fps with no apparent glitching

title: Rise of the Tomb Raider
notes: It runs like great if not better than on Windows while in the game, though some menu options create weird loops (exit button, for example, repeats the music before letting you exit the game)

Graphics set at High - FPS average at 80 - 100% smooth - using SSD theres no loadtimes at all - acutally seems faster on Linux than Windows 10 dev retail, on the same computer. Playing directly from Windows mounted partition, on Linux - but saves dont follow from Windows to Linux though.
